MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAN PRICE, TEL. NO. (650) 321-1440, APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PETITIONERS NOVELL FAMILY PARTNERSHIP LP and ALEX NOVELL's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award [CCP 1285 Et Seq.] IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS NOVELL FAMILY PARTNERSHIP LP AND ALEX NOVELL'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award IS Off calendar. Petitioners did not timely file proof of service for the petition. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1300(c).) In addition, Petitioners failed to comply with Local Rules 2.6B and 2.6C. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR#7489.
